title: OPEC chief dismisses IEA supply glut forecast as 'critical' Strait of Hormuz reopens
summary_full: The IEA said on Wednesday that a lasting resolution to the conflict could drive a surge in supply volumes and trigger a major oil overhang next year.
summary_public: The IEA said on Wednesday that a lasting resolution to the conflict could drive a surge in supply volumes and trigger a major oil overhang next year.
